meta.title: Cloud Security Strategy Services | GuidePoint Security
meta.description: Worried about cloud security risks? With GuidePoint Security’s expert cloud security strategy services, you can rest assured your environment is secure.

headings.text: Ensure the Right Cloud Security Controls are in Place
Comply with Emerging Standards and Compliance Programs
Minimize the Complexity of Your Cloud Environment
Reduce Security Risks Within Your Cloud Environment

paragraphs: With the continuous evolution of cloud computing and the constant rate of change its services have provided, it can be difficult to keep your cloud security strategy controls and processes up to speed.

We can help you navigate cloud computing’s constant state of flux by arming you with the right framework for cloud security controls as well as the best-fit cloud security tools to continuously monitor and manage risks and threats. Our security-first approach to your cloud environment is designed to:

sections.domClasses: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-55179dfc services-lifecycle elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-height-default watching-viewport in-view

headings.text: Having the Right Cloud Security Strategy Requires the Right Framework

paragraphs: We’ve developed a unique cloud security controls framework that assists you in creating a secure cloud environment and outlines key objectives. Our cloud security controls framework reviews over 150 risk and security controls based on the Cloud Security Alliance (CSA), CIS and our own operational experiences.

With the guidance of our cloud security company controls, your organization will be better able to track your services in the cloud and ensure they are all properly and securely configured. Additionally, our automated cloud security controls will account for your security-first cloud environment’s dynamic nature, which is particularly important for easing the burden on your cybersecurity teams.

headings.text: Select the Cloud Service Providers that Best Fit Your Program

paragraphs: We help you decide on the infrastructure and services needed to determine which cloud service providers are the right fit for your organization and environment.

In light of the fact that a growing number of IT systems are becoming externalized, it’s imperative that your organization selects a cloud provider that is conducive to your long-term success. We help you consider areas including cloud providers’ certifications and standards, policies on data governance and security, reputations for reliability, key technologies used and partnerships and service dependencies.

headings.text: Gain the Benefits of Having a Sound Cloud Security Strategy
Develop a Robust Cloud Security Plan​

paragraphs: Our Cloud Security Strategy service will help you ensure a “security first” approach to your cloud journey.
Protect your cloud environment from cyber threats, prevent data breaches and ensure compliance with cloud security regulations.
A solid cloud security will enable you to meet your objectives and adhere to security policies, procedures and standards.
We help you regularly audit and review your cloud security strategy to determine whether additional objectives should be considered.
